title: Investigate segfault in LangGraphScore pytest run on py311-dev

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Started investigation. Reproducing segfault from full suite at plexus/scores/LangGraphScore_test.py and checking for env/dependency drift vs CI.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Reproduced segfault in  at psycopg connect path. Root cause:  sets , and  calls , forcing PostgreSQL checkpointer initialization in unit tests. Verified no-code workaround: disable dotenv auto-load for tests and preload  minus that key. Full suite result with workaround:  (no segfault).

comments.author: derek
comments.text:
Reproduced segfault in LangGraphScore_test.py at psycopg connect path.

Root cause:
- .env sets PLEXUS_LANGGRAPH_CHECKPOINTER_POSTGRES_URI
- LangGraphScore.async_setup() calls load_dotenv('.env', override=True)
- Unit tests then force PostgreSQL checkpointer initialization and hit native psycopg segfault path

Verified no-code workaround:
- Disable dotenv auto-load during pytest
- Preload .env minus PLEXUS_LANGGRAPH_CHECKPOINTER_POSTGRES_URI

Full-suite result with workaround:
- 3198 passed, 44 skipped, 19 deselected, 3 xfailed
- No segfault
